text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After her day off, I greet Winning Ticket in the
central plaza...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
choice_data_list: You look sleepy. What did you do yesterday?
You look sleepy. What did you do yesterday?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Well, I enjoyed my day off as much as I could.
And I had looots of things I wanted to do...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
So I did all those things in a single day! Reading
manga, watching movies, eating tasty food, going
cycling—everything!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: It was sooo much fun. But then...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Before I knew it, it was morning again... Yawn...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like Ticket really enjoyed her time off—so
much that she didn't get a single wink of sleep.
